## Package-Specific Constraints

- **React Compiler is enabled.** DO NOT use `useMemo` or `useCallback` unless absolutely mandated by a third-party library API requirement.
- Prefer shadcn/ui components

## Generated Files (Do Not Edit Manually)

- `src/lib/bindings.ts` is generated by `tauri-specta`.
- Regenerate IPC bindings with `pnpm run gen:bindings` (from this package) or
  `pnpm --filter fricon-ui run gen:bindings` (from repo root).
- `src/routeTree.gen.ts` is generated by TanStack Router.

## Routing Rules Used in This Package

- Router is file-based under `src/routes/`.
- Under `src/routes/`, test/helper files must use a filename or folder prefixed with `-`
  so route generation skips them.

## Backend Integration Boundary

- Keep wire-to-domain normalization in `src/lib/backend.ts`
  (for example date parsing and strict response guards).
- Prefer typed APIs from generated bindings (`events.*`, commands, payload types)
  instead of hardcoded Tauri event strings.
